input.question: Compare average exam scores vs project scores by department

payload.question: Compare average exam scores vs project scores by department

output.sql:
SELECT
  department AS department,
  AVG(exam_score) AS avg_exam_score,
  AVG(project_score) AS avg_project_score,
  COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM student_scores
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY department ASC;

visualization.description: Compare average exam scores vs project scores by department (one point per department).
visualization.title: Average Exam Score vs Project Score by Department

payload.sql:
SELECT
  department AS department,
  AVG(exam_score) AS avg_exam_score,
  AVG(project_score) AS avg_project_score,
  COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM student_scores
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY department ASC;
